items.speaker: Adele
items.text: Lost... We lost. Our combined strength could not overpower you...

items.speaker: Francine
items.text: Don't get too obsessed with winning or losing, Adele. After all, meanings are mostly found through a process rather than from the outcome.

items.speaker: Francine
items.text: You won, {PlayerName}. I acknowledge your skill.

items.speaker: Adele
items.text: Even so… I can't help but feel a tiny bit upset.

items.speaker: Francine
items.text: Well, after your break is over, you'll be too busy to feel anything.

items.speaker: Adele
items.text: ...A sad reality that I cannot refute. But that is true for you as well, Francine!

items.speaker: Francine
items.text: Well... sigh. Might as well grab some energy gel to keep me going.
